description: Add a note to the plugin-development guide clarifying that `opentabs-plugin` is a binary provided by the `@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` devDependency and should be invoked via `npm run build` (not `npx opentabs-plugin`). Running `npx opentabs-plugin build` outside a plugin directory gives a confusing npm 404 error because npm looks for an unscoped `opentabs-plugin` package which doesn't exist. This is the only remaining MEDIUM-severity friction from the plugin developer experience QA test on v0.0.37. Known minor issue (not creating a story): plugin-development.mdx line 85 shows `readonly displayName` without `override` — technically correct since displayName is abstract, but inconsistent with the scaffolder which uses `override`.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add note about opentabs-plugin binary name vs package name in plugin-development guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want to understand that `opentabs-plugin` is a local binary from `@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` (not a standalone npm package), so that I don't waste time debugging a confusing npm 404 when trying `npx opentabs-plugin` outside my plugin directory.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Build and Test' section in plugin-development.mdx includes a brief note (1-2 sentences) explaining that `opentabs-plugin` is the binary name from the `@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools` devDependency, installed locally when running `npm install`. It is invoked automatically by `npm run build` and `npm run dev` — there is no need to use `npx opentabs-plugin` directly.
The note is placed after the first `npm run build` code block (around line 464), before or after the numbered list that explains the build steps
If a developer does need to invoke the tools CLI directly via npx, the note mentions the correct command: `npx @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools build`
No other content in the guide changes
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx (~lines 459-478)

The current 'First build' section shows:
```bash
npm run build
```
followed by an explanation of what the build does. Add a brief note after this section, something like:

> The `opentabs-plugin` command is provided by `@opentabs-dev/plugin-tools`, installed as a devDependency. It runs automatically via `npm run build` — you don't need to invoke it directly. If you do need to run it outside the plugin directory, use `npx @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools build` (not `npx opentabs-plugin`, which will fail with a 404 error because there is no unscoped npm package by that name).

Use whatever callout/admonition pattern exists in the docs site. Check other MDX files in docs/content/ for the pattern — likely an <Alert> component based on what plugin-development.mdx already uses (see line 31 for an existing Alert usage). If the Alert component is not available in this file, use a simple paragraph or blockquote.
